calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-23-2020 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Continued To Mar-23-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher Dewys for Administrator Stephen Hom.

Mr. Dewys stated he does not have much client contact even though his client is in San Francisco, that he was hoping the status report would be approved to buy more time to prepare the final account.

The status report of administration and request for extension of time to administer estate is continued to March 23, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for petition for final distribution to be filed by March 16, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: Anasse. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-24-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-24-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Continued To Dec-24-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on December 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-26-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Continued To Dec-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Chris Dewys for Stephen Hom (Administrator).

The Court noted that it does not have an inventory and appraisal, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Dewys stated that this estate is different, that there is no will, that asset search yielded nothing except for a litigation that is going on in the civil case (CGC-13-536307), that the matter was supposed to have settled as of June of 2018, that settlement may be derailed and that the matter may be put back on calendar in January. The Court informed Counsel that he has to file for approval of a status report. Status on close of estate is continued to December 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.
